---
title: 'Current Shows'
date: '2012-06-11T17:01:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1644347899464942837'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/current-shows.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Shows'
---

<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">Home</a><br />
<h2 style="text-align: center;">
   &nbsp;Current Shows and Locations</h2>
<div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<h4>
     <a href="http://hasletfarmersmarket.com/index.html" target="_blank">Haslet Farmers Market</a></h4>
<div>
<br /></div>
Saturdays from 8AM to 12PM<br />
Haslet Park in Haslet, TX<br />
<a href="http://hasletfarmersmarket.com/index.html" target="_blank">http://hasletfarmersmarket.com/index.html</a><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/city-of-haslet-element56-14952bd93b48.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="70" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/city-of-haslet-element56-61bc77d639e7.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<h4>
   <a href="http://www.sharonscountrystore.com/contact-us.html?zenid=69b2ab224c7ff05ab93fff34565a49ca" target="_blank">Sharon's Country Store</a></h4>
On Consignment at Sharon's Country Store<br />
<span style="background-color: white; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: left;"><br /></span><br />
<span style="background-color: white; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: left;">Sharon's Country Store</span><br />
<span style="background-color: white; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: left;">510752 Hwy 95</span><br />
<span style="background-color: white; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: left;">Bonners Ferry, Idaho 83805</span><br />
<span style="background-color: white; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-align: left;"><span class="gc-cs-link" id="gc-number-0" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" title="Call with Google Voice">(208) 267-7579</span></span><br />
<a href="http://www.sharonscountrystore.com/" target="_blank">http://www.sharonscountrystore.com/</a><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sharons-country-store-edc4928fa04d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="39" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sharons-country-store-bef54fd83dcd.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<h4>
   <a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Etsy&nbsp;</a></h4>
<div>
Items Periodically&nbsp;Available&nbsp;to Purchase online at the TC&amp;C Etsy Store</div>
<div>
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts</a></div>
<div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/etsy-logo-e7b92816810b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/etsy-logo-e7b92816810b.jpg" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<span style="font-size: 13px;">View&nbsp;</span><a href="https://maps.google.com/maps/ms?msa=0&amp;msid=209731201609266419314.0004c28a44b65d4d5bc49&amp;hl=en&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;ll=32.974189,-97.350712&amp;spn=0,0&amp;t=h&amp;source=embed" style="color: blue; font-size: 13px; text-align: left;" target="_blank">Texas Cows and Crafts Locations</a><span style="font-size: 13px;">&nbsp;in a larger map</span></div>
<div>
<iframe frameborder="0" height="350" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="https://maps.google.com/maps/ms?msa=0&amp;msid=209731201609266419314.0004c28a44b65d4d5bc49&amp;hl=en&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;ll=32.974189,-97.350712&amp;spn=0,0&amp;t=h&amp;output=embed" width="425"></iframe><br />
<small>View <a href="https://maps.google.com/maps/ms?msa=0&amp;msid=209731201609266419314.0004c28a44b65d4d5bc49&amp;hl=en&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;ll=32.974189,-97.350712&amp;spn=0,0&amp;t=h&amp;source=embed" style="color: blue; text-align: left;" target="_blank">Texas Cows and Crafts Locations</a> in a larger map</small></div>
<div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!</div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Flavia Wolfe</div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe></div>
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" /></div>
</div>
</div>
